3206260.name: Match 3 Game The World Is Going To
3206260.description:
A more grown-up Match 3 Game with thought provoking silent story.

Use fire, water, air, rock, lightning magic and sword to defeat enemies and to protect innocent.
Overcome obstacles like stones, sand, ice, roots, snakes, worms, swamp, blood and wildfire. Open chests, collect coins, buy boosters and bombs.

Unveil a dramatic story by going through 106 interesting levels, each with unique adventure and background.

Beautifully animated gems, powerful boosters and bombs.
Dramatic soundtrack!

A single player game.
Pay once and play, no hidden payments, no microtransactions.
